I am an AI language model developed by OpenAI, designed to understand and respond to natural language input. My purpose is to assist and communicate with humans in a human-like manner.

I am based on GPT (Generative Pre-training Transformer) architecture, which is a state-of-the-art deep learning model for natural language processing tasks. More specifically, I am an instance of GPT-3 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 3), one of the largest and most advanced language models currently available.
